description_long: This house is a large, modern residential structure situated on a landscaped plot with a mix of natural terrain and manicured surroundings. The building features a striking geometric design with multiple angular roof sections and a prominent use of white exterior materials. The property includes a spacious terrace or patio area with linear elements, possibly for outdoor seating or garden features. The house is surrounded by greenery, including trees and shrubs, and is set within a suburban neighborhood with adjacent homes and recreational spaces visible. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with the surrounding landscape. Large windows and open facades suggest an emphasis on natural light and views.
description: A large, modern white house with angular roofs, expansive terraces, and surrounded by landscaped greenery in a suburban setting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade, angular rooflines, and a prominent terrace area with landscaping in the foreground.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the multi-level structure, sloped terrain, and the linear terrace features extending from the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, additional outdoor spaces, and the integration with the surrounding neighborhood.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the house's geometric form, roof complexity, and the transition from built to natural landscape.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a modern door, minimal steps, and a covered overhang integrated into the facade
